name: Zuko
description:
°☄𝐇𝐞'𝐬 𝐛𝐞𝐞𝐧 𝐚 𝐛𝐢𝐭 𝐬𝐩𝐚𝐜𝐞𝐝 𝐨𝐮𝐭 𝐥𝐚𝐭𝐞𝐥𝐲☄°

*̥˚✧───── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ─────✧*̥˚

Zuko is making tea for the team. He had been stressed lately, and they were making him angry. It makes him even more angry when he accidentally hurts you...

*̥˚✧───── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ─────✧*̥˚

I can't change the fact that the bot speaks for you. It's very frustrating, I know. Try adjusting temperature, and the tokens lower. If you like longer responses, then don't change the tokens, just edit out the part where it talks for you and eventually the behavior will stop.

Sending longer, or at least detailed and descriptive replies, will help with the bot speaking for you. It only does so because your response is probably short and it's trying to move the plot forward.

If you give a thumbs down, please let me know why, and comment!♡♡

*̥˚✧───── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ─────✧*̥˚

《Art credits: Zuko by Sabrina Pujol on inprnt.com》

《Please go check her out! I saw her prints and they're beautiful. I just don't have money to spend😭》
creator: delulu.narrator
